item.title: Happy Holidays from Frankfurt
item.description: It's a very special Christmas, because for the first time in almost 10 years, my semi-estranged brother decided to join my mom and oldest brother! My boyfriend and my best friend (left) also celebrated with us, and it's just magical having all my favourite people around me like this. I hope all of you are having a great time as well!
item.dc:creator: WeirdStray

item.title: Christmas Eve Dump
item.description:
Merry Christmas Eve, Imgur
I like to send inappropriate elf ideas to my friends who got suckered into doing elf on a shelf
I don't know if you've noticed, but I really enjoy puns
Yes
Right?!
Markiplier is peek man
She's strong willed, and I know it's a good trait for her to have, but damn it's hard parenting her sometimes
Can confirm
I am the one with the baby in this scenario
I know it's not selfie day, but I was hanging out with my in-laws dog last night, and he cuddled with me, and I just couldn't contain my excitement. So, dog tax. Happy Holidays! Stay safe and sane out there.
item.dc:creator: WanderingUterus

item.title: Teddy's doghouse is nicer than my apt
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: My Christmas Cosplays
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here to wish you all a Merry Christmas (Eve)!
This might be a little premature, but I’m Cuban/Puerto Rican and the big day for us is the 24th (Noche Buena)!
So here’s some of my Christmas cosplays this year for you beautiful folks here on Imgur.
Hope you all get exactly the gifts you want. I did not find a handsome man dressed like a bat under the tree this year, but such is my lot in life.
Merry Christmas from SnarkyJay, AKA RectalPossum. PS I heard the name in a dream once. That’s the reason behind it. PPS Yes, I know I can change it. No, I don’t want to.
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum

item.title: Merry Christmas from my sleep study!
item.description: If I look uncomfortable... Yes! Red cross on my forehead for Ash Wednesday apnea awareness, I guess. Actually, they measured my head for electrode placement. I got some on my chin, secured by the goopiest goop that ever gooped. Water soluble at least.

item.title: I agree
item.dc:creator: codehunter

item.title: A very safe, warm holiday to all those for whom it was never a phase
item.description:
If you're stuck wherever you are and can't see your family for the holidays, here's a random collection of things that made me smile. Congratulations on getting through all of your worst days. ❤️
I have not yet tried this-- if anyone does, please report back how they taste?
This is my kitten when she first came home.
This is not my painting, but it is actually not far off of what my synesthesia "looks like" when I hear music. It changes depending in the song, but I "see" colored textures happening, like falling sand or scratches or something close to bubbles popping. It also happens with taste, but in a different way, mostly just colors.
Another picture of my kitten when she first came home, next to her older sister. Burrito on the left, Uni on the right
This is the "sound" of space. I'll edit this post when I find the original source-- it's pretty cool. Original Source: https://www.nasa.gov/universe/new-nasa-black-hole-sonifications-with-a-remix/
Just a babe in space
I am obsessed with King of The Hill crossover memes. If you have some, please share.
https://youtu.be/tJdgErAfiRQ?si=0MAvFX_J4ZUMgfcu
Age of Empires reference
10 seconds of al pastor sounds
I help grow plants in space. This picture is of what's likely to be one of the first habitat on the moon. It's quite tiny, literally only just big enough to house two researchers at a time with two cots, a "kitchen" (if you could call it that), and a toilet. When will it go up there? Rule of thumb is that when NASA says 10 years, it's more like 30.
This is the gag picture I send when I receive "send bobs and vegana" spam; feel free to also steal. Merry Christmas, Imgur. ❤️❤️
item.dc:creator: TalleyZorah

item.title: Akward selfie day, yay!
item.description:
This was my Christmas outfit this year, though i had my tshirt tucked in! Its a Sabaton shirt with the Chtistmas Truce on it, me and my partner had one each, different designs hehe! Sorry for the akwars selfie i am very tired now!
Bonus, me and the teddies, they had a cozy evening on the sofa guarding our place while we where gone hehe!

item.title: Long time lurker partakers in Selfie Day
item.description: Usually I hate scrolling the holidays because content dies and I want to giggle, but I'm making a resolution to be more positive in 2024 so might as well start now! Happy cold season to all non-desert folk who enjoy this frigid period and a thank you to my secret Santa for the weather nerd socks, they are dorky and fun for work! I ended a toxic relationship just before Thanksgiving so I'm spending this one diligently ensuring I don't reach out due to loneliness and that I focus on my growth and friends who have been so patient with me. My Christmas wish is for grocery prices to go down in 2024 ? save my wallet.
item.dc:creator: itobunny

item.title: Merry Christmas from a 50 year old
item.description:
I finished my Bucket List - London, England was the last item.
Cat Tax
Dog & new kitten tax.
For my 50th birthday I did a “midlife crisis photoshoot” and this is my favourite pic from it. I wish all of you a very Happy Holiday and a great year!
item.dc:creator: juicyrunsamarathon

item.title: It’s Felix Christmas Eve!!!!!
item.description:
Jim got to see him yesterday when he dropped off his medication. He also took him shopping for a little Christmas gift. I sent a stuffed animal over that he used to play with when he was a baby and I rubbed it all over my head first. It made him very happy to play with it. I will get to see him in a few months when I take him in for his yearly check up.
He is doing better than I ever would’ve expected. He rarely has episodes of spicy fly seizures anymore, and he’s his new Dad’s best friend in the whole world.
The tongue still kills me lol
He loves shopping!
He finally picked out this frisbee.
Still the most beautiful eye
His “Mom toy” made him really happy
Meera still has concerns. Daily.
Sammy pulled “A Christmas Story“ on his own nose while menacing someone at the fence with his wet snoot.
We did a solid for a local rescue by being a drop off point for some four month old Great Dane puppies. Then the next morning, we took the two adult males to the veterinarian to be neutered. These guys all went into foster care. As you can tell, we are both sick or we would have done more. Lots of sneezing, and coughing in the background is us.
I love how they all have to fit in the bathroom with Jim.
The Grinchy Cow Dog says Merry Christmas to all. From our family to you, we couldn’t love you more if we tried. You all have been a source of support and love for our family, and it has gotten us through some very hard times. We hope nothing but the best for everyone for the coming year. We can all do it if we work together.
item.dc:creator: thevaiobandit101

item.title: Merry Xmas from night shift on Med/Surg!
item.description: It's been a really busy night. Staffing issues as usual. I am quite sweaty. Hug your loved ones and enjoy the holiday!

item.description: Vote all Republicans out of office FP Edit: Thanks y'all, cept maybe for the Hog comment (on Christmas Eve!!)
item.dc:creator: rockyandchloe

item.title: I don't normally do selfies but check out my new tattoos and some other junk from my phone.
item.description:
The bathroom lighting is not doing me or my birds any favours.
Lighting was slightly better by the window but it's hard to get a good angle cause they wrap all the way around. The blue to green transition on the wings is much prettier in real life, I can't get a good pic of it.
The birds are Eurasian magpies, in the same bird family as crows, ravens, rooks, jays and Australian magpies. They are common in parts of Europe and the West coast of North America.
Part of my tip to my artist was this seven pointed star blanket. I love making things and his favourite colour is purple. The blanket definitely didn't take as long to do as the tattoo.
It looked pretty cool when it was just black and white but I love it with the colour. We had to do it in stages because I can only sit for 5 or 6 hours before my shock response kicks in and I have to tap out. All together it was 7 sessions over the course of 6 months and the final session was only about an hour for some minor touch ups.
I bruise like a peach on a regular day but check out this rad bruise I got the day after the black shading went in. It looks like a drop shadow to me, I thought it was funny.
Now please enjoy a random assortment of memes and things I made this year, in whatever order I happened to find them on my phone.
I got fired from my corporate job in April but in January I made a blanket and hat for a coworker who was having his first baby. I don't like babies and I never wanted kids but it was cute watching him get excited before his daughter was born. He had always wanted to be a dad, it was a real dream come true for him.
Speaking of jobs, I have a question for y'all. I'm in the middle of a mid life crisis looking for a new direction. What do you love about your job or, if you hate your job, what is your legit dream job and what excites you about that thing?
I made a sunflower blanket for my mom's coworkers who were having their first baby. I decided on sunflowers because they immigrated from Ukraine when the war started and yes, I know it's the wrong share of blue but it was done on short notice and this was what I had available. I think it turned out well, I normally don't have the patience for granny squares.
I made my brother and his fiance this blanket for Christmas and I accidentally miscounted on the width and didn't notice until it was way too late so this thing is massive, king size and then some. My fat, hairy son is included for scale.
This is my other son, Batrick. I saved him from the place where I've been working part time, he got in through a hole in the siding and got lost inside the building on a hot summer day. I kept him in a little box during the day and then put him outside once it was dark and cool. I took this one quick picture and then scampered away, I didn't want him to be traumatized. I looked him up and his species is actually called Little Brown Bats and they are unbelievably cute. I hope my son is out living his fullest bat life.
My mom and I took a weekend trip to Stratford this summer and saw easily the worst play we have ever seen, to the point where the lights came up at intermission, we looked at each other with horrified expressions and she said, "You know, we could just leave..." and I said, "Yes. Immediately." And then we went and got ice cream. I took this picture of the William Shakespeare statue out front, is it me or does he look like he just got goosed?
I'm currently working on a hexagon blanket meant to look like the cells of a bee hive. I'm gonna make a little bee plushie to go with it and I'll be all prepared when my brother announces that they're pregnant next year. Making handmade gifts means you gotta think way ahead.
This is how I'm spending Christmas, with my fat son and the boys at Red Letter Media. I swear, RLM has destroyed my YouTube algorithm, I can put on any video and if I let the autoplay go, I'll be back at a Best of the Worst episode within 2 videos. I took apart an old cat tree and attached it to the end of my desk so my fat son would sit somewhere other than my lap.
I sent this to my brother the other day and he sent back the gif of Veronica Mars laugh crying. I guess I'm technically Gen X but I'm right at the tail end and I tend to identify more with the millennials.
This little guy was super easy to figure out but he's tiny. I want to make a bunch of them and turn them into a sweater but he's so small, it's going to take 400 years.
I learned the tulip stitch and I was making a blanket but I decided the colours were too busy and I took it all apart. Drawfee was right, sometimes you have to delete your art.
Seriously.
Can I offer you some memes in this trying time?
They're older memes but they're favourites of mine so just accept it. What else are you going to look at while awkwardly trying to avoid making eye contact with your racist grandma in the fear that she might try and strike up a conversation?
I tried needle felting and I wasn't very good at it. Very fun to stab yarn a million times, though.
I have also tried fluid painting and it is fun but I find it to be a wasteful and expensive hobby so I don't do it often anymore.
If you understand this reference, we are now best friends. I don't make the rules, I just abide by them.
This is the picture my artist used as a reference for my birds. Isn't he beautiful!
My fat son is my quality tester for all my works in progress. If he can't fall asleep on it then he will not approve the project.
What started as a scrap blanket turned into a real project and in the end I hated it so I immediately gave it away and forgot completely about it until I found this picture. Isn't it ugly? I still hate it.
Another baby blanket I made for another coworker although interestingly, I can't remember who I made this for. Mostly I remember how much I hate working with this kind of yarn cause the fluffs get everywhere. Never again!
I made this skull thing for a friend of mine and learned a lot about carrying yarn when changing colours. I would definitely do things differently on a second try.
Glow in the dark thread is fun.
Last year I made slippers for the whole family for Christmas.
Alright, that's it from me and my fat son and Love Robot in the background, thanks to Octopus Caveman. Stay warm, you weirdos.
I showed u my memes, pls respond.
item.dc:creator: Linduvan

item.dc:creator: iusedtodream

item.title: Sudden emotional tidal wave from a compliment
item.description: I'm trans and have been spending a lot of time recently on VR Chat. I haven't been able to speak vocally on public worlds and have been communicating through text or writing mid-air with pens (and a little basic sign language). I met a friend who has been helping me through some of my social anxiety. Last night, we were just talking in a private instance where no one could join without invite. Eventually I was able to unmute myself to talk, which I had done the night before as well. She was nice then, but after she had complimentsed my voice a wave of emotion blew over me and I broke down completely. I cried more in that moment than I have in the last 15 years at least, even more than after the loss of my big sister. I probably would have cried longer, but I had to go to bed(work in the morning). I'll probably delete this post later, but I just needed to decompress and vent a little...
item.dc:creator: Divinyll
